---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature for Hermetic
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred approach.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why were they rejected?

## Security Impact Assessment

Does this feature touch any of the following?

- [ ] Cryptographic operations (hermetic-core)
- [ ] Network/transport layer (hermetic-transport)
- [ ] Daemon protocol or handle system (hermetic-daemon)
- [ ] MCP tool interface (hermetic-mcp)
- [ ] Python FFI boundary (hermetic-sdk)
- [ ] None of the above

If any boxes are checked, this feature may require a constitutional amendment process per [GOVERNANCE_RULES.md](../docs/governance/GOVERNANCE_RULES.md). Security-affecting features need Mentor authorization.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, mockups, or references.
